1.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
1.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

1.gl: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)
1.kj: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, re
1.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

1.gl: (concretely) a boy (as active), from the age of infancy to adolescence; by implication, a servant; also (by interch. of sex), a girl (of similar latitude in age)
1.kj: babe, boy, child, damsel (from the margin), lad, servant, young (man).

1.gl: Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
1.dv: from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H410 (אֵל); he will rule as God;

1.gl: to have affection for (sexually or otherwise)
Mitsrajim, i.e. Upper and Lower Egypt

2.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
2.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
2.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

2.gl: to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively)
2.kj: (all) along, apace, behave (self), come, (on) continually, be conversant, depart, [phrase] be eased, enter, exercise (self), [phrase] follow, forth, forward, get, go (about, abroad
2.dv: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root;

2.gl: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)
2.kj: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, re
2.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);

2.gl: to smoke, i.e. turn into fragrance by fire (especially as an act of worship)
2.kj: burn (incense, sacrifice) (upon), (altar for) incense, kindle, offer (incense, a sacrifice).
2.dv: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of fumigation in a close place and perhaps thus driving out the occupants);

2.gl: to slaughter an animal (usually in sacrifice)

3.gl: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designati
3.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

3.gl: to take (in the widest variety of applications)
3.kj: accept, bring, buy, carry away, drawn, fetch, get, infold, [idiom] many, mingle, place, receive(-ing), reserve, seize, send for, take (away, -ing, up), use, win.

3.gl: the arm (as stretched out), or (of animals) the foreleg; figuratively, force
3.kj: arm, [phrase] help, mighty, power, shoulder, strength.
3.dv: or (shortened) זְרֹעַ; and (feminine) זְרוֹעָה; or זְרֹעָה; from H2232 (זָרַע);

3.gl: properly, to mend (by stitching), i.e. (figuratively) to cure
3.kj: cure, (cause to) heal, physician, repair, [idiom] thoroughly, make whole. See H7503 (רָפָה).

3.gl: Ephrajim, a son of Joseph; also the tribe descended from him, and its territory
3.dv: dual of masculine form of H672 (אֶפְרָת); double fruit;

4.gl: to stretch or spread out; by implication, to bend away (including moral deflection); used in a great variety of application
4.kj: [phrase] afternoon, apply, bow (down, -ing), carry aside, decline, deliver, extend, go down, be gone, incline, intend, lay, let down, offer, outstretched, overthrown, pervert, pitc

4.gl: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
4.kj: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, ([idiom] a-) lou

4.gl: a rope (as twisted), especially a measuring line; by implication, a district or inheritance (as measured); or a noose (as of cords); figuratively, a company (as if tied together); also a throe (especially of parturition)
4.kj: band, coast, company, cord, country, destruction, line, lot, pain, pang, portion, region, rope, snare, sorrow, tackling.

4.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
4.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

4.gl: to draw, used in a great variety of applications (including to sow, to sound, to prolong, to develop, to march, to remove, to delay, to be tall, etc.)
4.kj: draw (along, out), continue, defer, extend, forbear, [idiom] give, handle, make (pro-, sound) long, [idiom] sow, scatter, stretch out.
[idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

5.gl: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
5.kj: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom]

5.gl: Ashshur, the second son of Shem; also his descendants and the country occupied by them (i.e. Assyria), its region and its empire
5.kj: Asshur, Assur, Assyria, Assyrians. See H838 (אָשֻׁר).
5.dv: or אַשֻּׁר; apparently from H833 (אָשַׁר) (in the sense of successful);

5.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
5.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
5.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

5.gl: Mitsrajim, i.e. Upper and Lower Egypt

6.gl: properly, to twist or whirl (in a circular or spiral manner), i.e. (specifically) to dance, to writhe in pain (especially of parturition) or fear; figuratively, to wait, to pervert
6.kj: bear, (make to) bring forth, (make to) calve, dance, drive away, fall grievously (with pain), fear, form, great, grieve, (be) grievous, hope, look, make, be in pain, be much (sore)

6.gl: to end, whether intransitive (to cease, be finished, perish) or transitived (to complete, prepare, consume)
6.kj: accomplish, cease, consume (away), determine, destroy (utterly), be (when... were) done, (be an) end (of), expire, (cause to) fail, faint, finish, fulfil, [idiom] fully, [idiom] ha

6.gl: properly, separation; by implication, a part of the body, branch of atree, bar forcarrying; figuratively, chief of a city; especially (with prepositional prefix) as an adverb, apart, only, besides
6.kj: alone, apart, bar, besides, branch, by self, of each alike, except, only, part, staff, strength.

6.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
6.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
6.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

6.kj: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

6.gl: drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement
6.kj: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool.

7.gl: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
7.kj: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, ([idiom] a-) lou

7.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
to suspend; figuratively (through hesitation) to be uncertain; by implication (of mental dependence) to habituate
properly, the top; specifically, the highest (i.e. God); also (adverb) aloft, to Jehovah

7.kj: alike, at all (once), both, likewise, only, (al-) together, withal.

8.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
8.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

8.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
8.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

8.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
8.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

8.gl: to turn about or over; by implication, to change, overturn, return, pervert
8.kj: [idiom] become, change, come, be converted, give, make (a bed), overthrow (-turn), perverse, retire, tumble, turn (again, aside, back, to the contrary, every way).

8.gl: properly, to intertwine or contract, i.e. (by implication) to shrivel (as with heat); figuratively, to be deeply affected with passion (love or pity)
Ephrajim, a son of Joseph; also the tribe descended from him, and its territory
8.dv: dual of masculine form of H672 (אֶפְרָת); double fruit;

9.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
9.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
9.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

9.gl: properly, the nearest part, i.e. the center, whether literal, figurative or adverbial (especially with preposition)
9.kj: [idiom] among, [idiom] before, bowels, [idiom] unto charge, [phrase] eat (up), [idiom] heart, [idiom] him, [idiom] in, inward ([idiom] -ly, part, -s, thought), midst, [phrase] out

9.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
9.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

10.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
10.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

10.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
10.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

10.gl: to shudder with terror; hence, to fear; also to hasten (with anxiety)
10.kj: be (make) afraid, be careful, discomfit, fray (away), quake, tremble.

10.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
10.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
